c.d: The total number of active users on the platform.
c.s: App Annie, Sensor Tower, SimilarWeb, Official App Websites

c.d: The maximum number of participants that can be included in a single broadcast or group message.
c.s: Official App Documentation, Help Centers, Tech Specification Websites

c.d: The percentage of messages successfully delivered to the intended recipients.
c.s: App Reviews, User Feedback, Independent Testing Reports

c.d: The availability of the app across different platforms such as iOS, Android, Web, Desktop, etc.
c.s: Official App Websites, App Store Listings, Tech Blogs

c.d: The overall design, ease of use, and user satisfaction with the app's interface and features.
c.s: App Reviews, User Feedback, UI/UX Analysis Reports

c.d: The measures taken by the app to ensure user data security and privacy, such as end-to-end encryption, two-factor authentication, etc.
c.s: Official App Documentation, Security Audit Reports, Tech News Articles

c.d: The ability of the app to integrate with other services and platforms for extended functionality.
c.s: Official App Websites, Developer Documentation, Tech Blogs

c.d: The cost associated with using the app, including any subscription fees or in-app purchases.
c.s: App Store Listings, Official App Websites, Pricing Pages
